layers.name: Content Pipeline
layers.strapline: What the brand says and ships
layers.summary: Capture, shape, schedule, and review the stories that keep the diner top of mind.

items.title: Truck Story Capture
items.summary: Log customer moments, catering photos, and route surprises before the shift closes.

items.title: Weekly Content Calendar
items.summary: Turn captured moments into a five-post plan across TikTok, Instagram, and local promos.

items.title: Creative Approvals
items.summary: Approve offers, visuals, and franchise talking points before publishing.

items.title: Performance Feedback Loop
items.summary: Feed top-performing hooks and underperforming posts back into the next content batch.

referenceFiles.title: Juke's Brand Voice + Retro Rules
referenceFiles.summary: Tone, phrases, visual language, and what Flo should sound like for public-facing work.

referenceFiles.title: Content Calendar + Campaign Rhythm
referenceFiles.summary: Weekly posting cadence, campaign lanes, approvals, and required assets.

referenceFiles.title: Offer Library + Catering CTAs
referenceFiles.summary: Bookable offers, catering hooks, lead magnets, and approved calls to action.

referenceFiles.title: Performance Notes + Winning Hooks
referenceFiles.summary: Top posts, weak posts, audience response, and what should be reused.

layers.name: Internal Ops
layers.summary: Keep operators, training, and support decisions visible enough to scale without guesswork.

items.title: Opening Playbook
items.summary: Bundle permitting, training, local supplier setup, and first-week milestones for each new operator.

items.title: Field Ops Scoreboard
items.summary: Track sales, ticket times, food cost, and catering close rate in one operating snapshot.

items.title: Support Escalation Desk
items.summary: Route urgent operator questions into one queue with owner, SLA, and documented fix.

items.title: Vendor Sync
items.summary: Consolidate distributor pricing and outage alerts before they hit store-level ordering.

referenceFiles.title: Internal Ops SOP Index
referenceFiles.summary: Opening, closing, prep, staffing, event service, and escalation SOPs.

referenceFiles.title: Team Roles + Ownership Map
referenceFiles.summary: Who owns what across social, catering, field operations, support, and approvals.

referenceFiles.title: Catering Intake + Follow-up Script
referenceFiles.summary: Required questions, qualification steps, response SLA, and handoff rules for leads.

referenceFiles.title: Vendor Roster + Substitution Rules
referenceFiles.summary: Approved vendors, backup items, pricing watchlist, and outage escalation notes.

commandCenter.title: Capture Inbox
commandCenter.description: Slack, DMs, field notes, customer comments, and loose ideas enter here first.

commandCenter.title: Content Engine
commandCenter.description: Turns raw stories into approved, scheduled, measured social content.

commandCenter.title: Ops Control
commandCenter.description: Protects execution quality: launch readiness, weekly scoreboard, escalations, vendors.

commandCenter.title: Franchise Scale
commandCenter.description: Packages learning into playbooks future operators can repeat.
